---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the VS Code extension
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you imagine this working? Include any UI mockup, command name, or setting you have in mind.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or alternative approaches.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, or related issues.
